chapter_title.ar: بَابُ فَضْلِ زِيَارَةِ أَبِي الْحَسَنِ مُوسَى ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 233 – Merits of the Ziyarah of Abu Al-Hassan Musa<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/311)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/311)
text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ زِيَارَةِ قَبْرِ أَبِي الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) مِثْلُ قَبْرِ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ نَعَمْ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Ali Al Washa,
(It has been narrated) from Al-Rezaasws, said, ‘I asked himasws about Ziyarah of the grave of Abu Al-Hassanasws is like the grave of Al-Husaynasws?’ Heasws said: ‘Yes’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Hassan ibn Ali al-Washsha’ who has said the following: “I once asked al-Rida’, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, ‘Is visiting the grave of abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, like visiting the grave of al-Husayn, ‘Alayhi al-Salam ?’ He (the Imam) replied, ‘Yes, it is so.’”
